info.description: Goen REST API (MVP scaffold). Includes health checks and connectivity probes.
info.title: Goen API

get.description: List accounts that the current user can access.

post.description: Create a new financial account for the current user.

get.description: Get a single account (must be accessible to current user).
Get current logged in user information.

post.description: Sign in with email/phone and password.
Create a new user account (email or phone required).

get.description: List budgets owned by current user; includes computed spent/remaining.

post.description: Create a new budget owned by current user.

get.description: Get a single budget owned by current user; includes computed spent/remaining.
List categories accessible to current user (includes global default categories).

post.description: Create a new category owned by current user.

get.description: Get a single category owned by current user.
Probes Postgres and Redis and returns diagnostic info.
Liveness check for goen-api.
Lightweight endpoint for browser/app connectivity test.
Readiness check; includes Postgres/Redis status when configured.
List rotating savings groups owned by current user.

post.description: Create a new rotating savings group (hụi/họ) owned by current user.

get.description: Get a rotating savings group owned by current user.
List contributions/payouts for a rotating savings group owned by current user.

post.description: Create a contribution/payout. Server will create the underlying Transaction and link 1-1.

get.description: List savings instruments accessible to current user.

post.description: Create a new SavingsInstrument (1-1 extension of a savings Account).

get.description: Get a single SavingsInstrument accessible to current user.
List tags owned by current user.

post.description: Create a new tag owned by current user.

get.description: Get a single tag owned by current user.
List transactions visible to current user; supports filtering by account and time range.
Get a single transaction if visible to current user.
